title: Semantic alias generator for topics with keyword extraction and expansion
purpose: Extracts and expands keywords from topic titles and content to generate semantic aliases, supporting synonym and abbreviation expansion.
module_context: Exports types and constants for topic content and alias generation options, along with functions for keyword extraction, synonym expansion, abbreviation expansion, and main alias generation pipeline.

steps.content: Normalize the title to lowercase.
Split the normalized title on word boundaries and punctuation.
Filter out words that are shorter than the minimum length.
Filter out words that are stop words.
Return the unique keywords as a sorted array.
Combine the conceptual and technical sections of the content.
Handle empty content by returning an empty array.
Normalize the combined text to lowercase and split on word boundaries.
Count the frequency of each word that is at least three characters long.
Filter out words that are stop words during frequency counting.
Sort the words by frequency in descending order.
Return the top N words based on the specified limit.
Initialize a set with the input keywords.
Iteratively expand the keyword set with synonyms until no new keywords are added.
For each key in the synonym mapping, if it exists in the current set, add all its synonyms.
For each keyword in the current set, check if it matches any synonym value and add the corresponding key.
Return the expanded keywords as a sorted array.
Initialize a set with the input keywords.
For each keyword, if it has a corresponding abbreviation, add the abbreviation to the set.
For each abbreviation in the mapping, if it matches a keyword in the set, add the long form to the set.
Return the expanded keywords as a sorted array.

methods.name: generateAliases
methods.normalized_params: (name: string, title: string, content: TopicContent, options: AliasGeneratorOptions): string[]

steps.content: Resolve the options with default values for max aliases, minimum alias length, and inclusion flags.
Initialize a set to store the aliases.
Extract keywords from the title and add them to the aliases set.
If synonym expansion is enabled, expand the aliases with synonyms and update the set.
If abbreviation expansion is enabled, expand the aliases with abbreviations and update the set.
If content keyword extraction is enabled, extract keywords from the content and add them to the aliases set.
Remove the canonical name from the aliases set.
Filter the aliases by the minimum alias length.
Limit the aliases to the maximum number and sort them.
